title: satureja intricata var. dufourii
intro: Satureja intricata var. dufourii, also known as Dufour's savory or mountain savory, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Dufour's savory include its ability to aid digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and support respiratory health. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or essential oil, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being and relieve various health issues.
